Class Board

java.lang.Object
scorefour.model.Board
public class Board extends Object
A Board is where the main interaction with the game takes place.

Contains Peg's.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Board()
    Constructs a new Board and initializes its Peg's.
    Board(Board board)
    Constructs a new copy of a Board

    Adds a Bead to a specified Peg.

    clearBoard()
    Clears all the Peg's on the Board.

    getPegs()
    Returns an array of all Peg's on the Board.

    removeBead(int[] position)
    Removes a Bead from the top of the specified Peg.
    String
    toString()
    Constructs a String representation of the Board using StringBuilder.

  • Constructor Details

    • Board

      public Board()
      Constructs a new Board and initializes its Peg's.

    • Board

      public Board(Board board)
      Constructs a new copy of a Board
      Parameters:
      board - the board to be copied

  • Method Details

    • addBead

      public void addBead(int[] position, BeadColour colour)
      Adds a Bead to a specified Peg.
      Parameters:
      position - the Peg position for the Bead to be added to.
      colour - the BeadColour for the Bead to be.

    • removeBead

      public void removeBead(int[] position)
      Removes a Bead from the top of the specified Peg.
      Parameters:
      position - location of the Peg.

    • getPegs

      public Peg[][] getPegs()
      Returns an array of all Peg's on the Board.
      Returns:
      an array of Peg's

    • getPeg

      public Peg getPeg(int[] position)

    • clearBoard

      public void clearBoard()
      Clears all the Peg's on the Board.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Constructs a String representation of the Board using StringBuilder.
